_note: Operators lab. REQUIRES the CloudNativePG operator pre-installed (CRDs + operand images mirrored). CRC here has NO CNPG operator, so all checks (CRDs present, api-resource, CR created, CR reconciled) are EXPECTED TO FAIL. This validates the workshop deploys/renders; the reconcile path needs the operator on the platform.

steps.run: envsubst < sample-cr.yaml | oc apply -f - || echo 'CNPG CRD absent (expected on CRC)'
